misfits.title: Metric Fixation
misfits.description: A number chosen to stand for a goal is hit exactly and truthfully, and the goal it stood for quietly dies.

misfits.title: The Decision Travels
misfits.description: A correct decision crosses the whole chain while the Body who must live with it never follows it.

misfits.title: The Success Trap
misfits.description: A firm does everything right, and is undone from below by the one market its own discipline was built to refuse.

misfits.title: The Trip to Abilene
misfits.description: A group agrees its way into a choice no member wanted, each misreading the others' assent for a wish it lacked.

misfits.title: Watermelon Reporting
misfits.description: Green on the skin, red in the flesh: the red never reaches a seat that can act, because every rung is paid to move on.
